title: Fantastic Smoked Brazilian Asparagus Skillet
description: A nutty and dense Brazilian dish featuring asparagus, perfect for midnight cravings, with a smoky flavor and low sodium content.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the asparagus to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes until tender.
Sprinkle the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper over the asparagus and stir to combine.
Pour in the low-sodium chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 5 minutes until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Serve the smoked asparagus skillet hot, garnished with additional parmesan cheese if desired.
